_meta.source: Z-Anatomy '4: Muscular system' (CC BY-SA — BodyParts3D + Z-Anatomy)
_meta.scope: Option B — major + surface (~90 tappable tokens), 3-tier depth peel + 7-region isolation
_meta.usage: Single source of truth consumed by BOTH the Blender export (naming/grouping/material) and the AnatomyViewer config (STRUCTURES/LAYERS). Classifier lowercases the source mesh name and finds the FIRST token whose any `match` substring is contained; checks `drop` patterns first.

tokens.label: Frontalis
tokens.blurb: Raises the eyebrows and wrinkles the forehead; part of the occipitofrontalis.

tokens.label: Occipitalis
tokens.blurb: Pulls the scalp backward; the rear belly of the occipitofrontalis.

tokens.label: Orbicularis oculi
tokens.blurb: The sphincter that closes the eyelids (blinking, squinting).

tokens.label: Orbicularis oris
tokens.blurb: The sphincter around the mouth; purses and closes the lips (the muscles of facial expression cluster here).

tokens.label: Zygomaticus
tokens.blurb: Lifts the corner of the mouth — the smiling muscle.

tokens.label: Buccinator
tokens.blurb: Compresses the cheek against the teeth (chewing, blowing, whistling).

tokens.label: Masseter
tokens.blurb: The main chewing muscle; elevates the mandible. One of the strongest muscles by weight.

tokens.label: Temporalis
tokens.blurb: Fan-shaped chewing muscle; closes the jaw and retracts the mandible.

tokens.label: Pterygoid muscles
tokens.blurb: Deep jaw muscles that protrude the mandible and produce side-to-side grinding.

tokens.label: Platysma
tokens.blurb: Thin superficial sheet of the neck; tenses the skin and depresses the jaw/lip.

tokens.label: Sternocleidomastoid
tokens.blurb: Turns and tilts the head; the prominent strap on the side of the neck.

tokens.label: Suprahyoid muscles
tokens.blurb: Above the hyoid bone; elevate the hyoid and floor of the mouth during swallowing.

tokens.label: Infrahyoid muscles
tokens.blurb: Below the hyoid; depress the hyoid and larynx after swallowing.

tokens.label: Scalene muscles
tokens.blurb: Elevate the upper ribs (accessory breathing) and flex the neck laterally.

tokens.label: Prevertebral muscles
tokens.blurb: Deep flexors in front of the cervical spine.

tokens.label: Suboccipital muscles
tokens.blurb: Small deep muscles connecting the skull to the top two vertebrae; fine head movements.

tokens.label: Extraocular muscles
tokens.blurb: The six muscles that move each eyeball plus the lid-lifter.

tokens.label: Pharyngeal & laryngeal muscles
tokens.blurb: Drive swallowing (constrictors) and the voice box (laryngeal muscles).

tokens.label: Tongue muscles
tokens.blurb: Extrinsic tongue muscles that move the tongue in chewing, swallowing and speech.

tokens.label: Pectoralis major
tokens.blurb: Large fan of the chest; adducts and medially rotates the arm (pushing, throwing).

tokens.label: Pectoralis minor
tokens.blurb: Deep to pec major; pulls the scapula forward and down.

tokens.label: Subclavius
tokens.blurb: Small muscle steadying the clavicle.

tokens.label: Serratus anterior
tokens.blurb: Wraps the ribs to the scapula; protracts and rotates the scapula ('boxer's muscle'). Winging if its nerve fails.

tokens.label: Rectus abdominis
tokens.blurb: The 'six-pack'; flexes the trunk and supports the abdominal wall.

tokens.label: External oblique
tokens.blurb: Outermost abdominal sheet; rotates and flexes the trunk, compresses the abdomen.

tokens.label: Internal oblique
tokens.blurb: Middle abdominal sheet; fibres run opposite to the external oblique for trunk rotation.

tokens.label: Transversus abdominis
tokens.blurb: Deepest abdominal sheet; the body's natural 'corset' compressing the abdomen.

tokens.label: Intercostal muscles
tokens.blurb: Between the ribs; raise and lower the rib cage during breathing.

tokens.label: Diaphragm
tokens.blurb: The dome-shaped main muscle of breathing; flattens to pull air in.

tokens.label: Quadratus lumborum
tokens.blurb: Deep posterior abdominal wall; side-bends the trunk and fixes the 12th rib.

tokens.label: Trapezius
tokens.blurb: Large diamond over the upper back; elevates, retracts and rotates the scapula.

tokens.label: Latissimus dorsi
tokens.blurb: Broad muscle of the back; extends, adducts and medially rotates the arm (pull-ups, swimming).

tokens.label: Rhomboids
tokens.blurb: Retract the scapula toward the spine; deep to the trapezius.

tokens.label: Levator scapulae
tokens.blurb: Elevates the scapula and side-bends the neck.

tokens.label: Splenius
tokens.blurb: Straps of the neck; extend and rotate the head and neck.

tokens.label: Erector spinae
tokens.blurb: The three-column extensor of the spine (iliocostalis, longissimus, spinalis) that keeps you upright.

tokens.label: Transversospinalis (deep back)
tokens.blurb: Deepest back muscles spanning a few vertebrae each; fine spinal control and posture.

tokens.label: Deltoid
tokens.blurb: Caps the shoulder; abducts the arm (and its parts flex/extend it).

tokens.label: Biceps brachii
tokens.blurb: Flexes the elbow and supinates the forearm; the classic 'making a muscle' bulge.

tokens.label: Triceps brachii
tokens.blurb: Back of the arm; the main extensor of the elbow.

tokens.label: Brachialis
tokens.blurb: Deep to biceps; the workhorse elbow flexor.

tokens.label: Coracobrachialis
tokens.blurb: Flexes and adducts the arm at the shoulder.

tokens.label: Supraspinatus
tokens.blurb: Rotator-cuff muscle; starts arm abduction and stabilises the shoulder.

tokens.label: Infraspinatus
tokens.blurb: Rotator-cuff muscle; laterally rotates the arm.

tokens.label: Subscapularis
tokens.blurb: Rotator-cuff muscle on the front of the scapula; medially rotates the arm.

tokens.label: Teres major
tokens.blurb: Adducts and medially rotates the arm ('lat's little helper').

tokens.label: Teres minor
tokens.blurb: Rotator-cuff muscle; laterally rotates the arm.

tokens.label: Anconeus
tokens.blurb: Small elbow extensor assisting the triceps.

tokens.label: Brachioradialis
tokens.blurb: Flexes the elbow with the forearm in mid-position (the 'hammer' muscle).

tokens.label: Superficial forearm flexors
tokens.blurb: Front-of-forearm group that flexes the wrist; the tendons you feel at the wrist.

tokens.label: Superficial forearm extensors
tokens.blurb: Back-of-forearm group that extends the wrist and fingers.

tokens.label: Flexor digitorum superficialis
tokens.blurb: Flexes the middle finger joints; the intermediate flexor layer.

tokens.label: Pronator teres
tokens.blurb: Pronates the forearm (turns the palm down).

tokens.label: Supinator
tokens.blurb: Supinates the forearm (turns the palm up).

tokens.label: Deep forearm muscles
tokens.blurb: Deep layer working the thumb and fingertip joints.

tokens.label: Intrinsic hand muscles
tokens.blurb: Small muscles within the hand that fine-tune finger and thumb movements (grip, pinch).

tokens.label: Gluteus maximus
tokens.blurb: Largest, most superficial buttock muscle; extends the hip (standing, climbing). The IT tract is its tendon sheet.

tokens.label: Gluteus medius
tokens.blurb: Abducts the hip and keeps the pelvis level when walking.

tokens.label: Gluteus minimus
tokens.blurb: Deepest gluteal; assists hip abduction and medial rotation.

tokens.label: Tensor fasciae latae
tokens.blurb: Tightens the iliotibial band on the side of the thigh; assists hip flexion/abduction.

tokens.label: Iliopsoas
tokens.blurb: The main hip flexor (iliacus + psoas major); lifts the thigh.

tokens.label: Deep hip rotators
tokens.blurb: Short deep muscles that laterally rotate the hip and form the pelvic floor.

tokens.label: Rectus femoris
tokens.blurb: The central quadriceps head; extends the knee and flexes the hip.

tokens.label: Vastus lateralis
tokens.blurb: Outer quadriceps; powerful knee extensor.

tokens.label: Vastus medialis
tokens.blurb: Inner quadriceps; stabilises the kneecap and extends the knee.

tokens.label: Vastus intermedius
tokens.blurb: Deep quadriceps head between the two vasti; extends the knee.

tokens.label: Sartorius
tokens.blurb: Longest muscle in the body; crosses the thigh to flex hip and knee ('tailor's muscle').

tokens.label: Adductor group
tokens.blurb: Inner-thigh muscles that pull the leg toward the midline.

tokens.label: Gracilis
tokens.blurb: Slender inner-thigh muscle; adducts the hip and flexes the knee.

tokens.label: Biceps femoris
tokens.blurb: Lateral hamstring; flexes the knee and extends the hip.

tokens.label: Semitendinosus
tokens.blurb: Medial hamstring; flexes the knee and extends the hip.

tokens.label: Semimembranosus
tokens.blurb: Deep medial hamstring; flexes the knee and extends the hip.

tokens.label: Gastrocnemius
tokens.blurb: The two-headed calf muscle; plantarflexes the foot and flexes the knee (jumping, push-off).

tokens.label: Soleus
tokens.blurb: Deep to gastrocnemius; plantarflexes the foot for standing and walking. Feeds the Achilles tendon.

tokens.label: Plantaris
tokens.blurb: Small slender calf muscle; weak plantarflexor.

tokens.label: Tibialis anterior
tokens.blurb: Front of the shin; dorsiflexes and inverts the foot (lifts the foot when walking).

tokens.label: Extensor digitorum longus
tokens.blurb: Extends the toes and dorsiflexes the foot.

tokens.label: Fibularis (peroneus)
tokens.blurb: Lateral leg; everts the foot and plantarflexes — guards against ankle sprains.

tokens.label: Tibialis posterior
tokens.blurb: Deep calf; inverts the foot and supports the arch.

tokens.label: Deep leg flexors
tokens.blurb: Deep posterior leg; curl the toes and unlock the knee (popliteus).

tokens.label: Intrinsic foot muscles
tokens.blurb: Small muscles within the foot that support the arches and move the toes.
